title: Better_Armors
description: A simple texture pack to replaces default armor textures with smoother, more detailed, and visually improved designs for a better in-game look.
body:
🛡️ Better Armors is a Minecraft texture pack that upgrades all armor sets with smooth, clean, and better-looking designs while staying vanilla-friendly.

✨ This pack enhances armor visuals with improved shading, consistent textures, and a more modern appearance, without affecting gameplay or performance. It fits perfectly for Survival, SMP, PvP, and UHC worlds.

🚀 Designed to be lightweight and performance-friendly, Better Armors works smoothly alongside other resource packs.

🔥 Key Features:

--> 🧱 Smooth & Clean Armor Textures

--> 🎨 Improved Details and Shading

--> 🌿 Vanilla-Style Friendly

--> ⚔️ Perfect for PvP, SMP & UHC

--> 💨 Lightweight & Lag-Free

"Credit" --> Shader:Complementary Shaders - Unbound
